signal_contract.paired_contrast_definition: beta_boundary = mean(Gamma_on - Gamma_off) within randomized paired blocks after registered nuisance re-entry

blinding_contract.blind_custodian_role: independent boundary-label custodian outside acquisition and primary analysis
blinding_contract.emergency_unblinding_rule: Only a documented safety event approved by the principal investigator and blind custodian may reveal labels; affected data are excluded from confirmatory inference but retained for audit.
blinding_contract.ordinary_unblinding_rule: Unblind only after raw hashes, calibration certificates, clock audit, exclusion mask, covariance model, frozen code hash, and negative-control gates pass.

statistical_decision_contract.primary_model_formula: Gamma_bi = mu + beta_boundary B_bi + beta_order O_bi + beta_distance z_bi + beta_nuisance^T x_bi + u_block + epsilon_bi

acquisition.blind_custodian_role: independent boundary-label custodian outside acquisition and primary analysis
acquisition.unblinding_rule: Unblind only after raw hashes, calibration certificates, clock audit, exclusion mask, covariance model, frozen code hash, and negative-control gates pass.

systematics.sensor_or_channel: charge-step monitor and three-axis compensation electrodes
systematics.calibration_method: single-electron charge stepping before and after every acquisition block
systematics.negative_control: electric-field reversal with boundary state held fixed

systematics.sensor_or_channel: Kelvin-probe surface map and particle force-gradient channel
systematics.calibration_method: distance and lateral raster with boundary gate disabled
systematics.negative_control: translated particle trajectory over a reference surface sector
systematics.acceptance_metric: absolute partial correlation with coherence residual

systematics.sensor_or_channel: gate current, local electric-field pickup, and RF spectrum channels
systematics.calibration_method: sham voltage waveform into a non-tunable reference load
systematics.negative_control: identical electrical pulse with no boundary-state transition
systematics.acceptance_metric: absolute partial correlation with coherence residual

systematics.sensor_or_channel: cofabricated thermometer and particle effective-temperature estimator
systematics.calibration_method: known heater pulse matched to switching dissipation

systematics.sensor_or_channel: three-axis seismometer and chip interferometric displacement
systematics.calibration_method: injected shaker tones spanning the acquisition bandwidth
systematics.negative_control: mechanical injection with boundary state fixed

systematics.sensor_or_channel: laser power, photon-count, and out-of-loop motion channels
systematics.negative_control: matched optical exposure with static boundary label
systematics.acceptance_metric: boundary-state difference in fitted readout decoherence rate

systematics.sensor_or_channel: potential-center estimator and shot-to-shot displacement record
systematics.calibration_method: dark/inverted-potential alignment scan before every block
systematics.negative_control: state-expansion sequence with boundary held fixed

systematics.sensor_or_channel: calibrated ion gauge and fitted gas-damping channel
shield and particle thermometry with spectral-emissivity model
systematics.negative_control: matched radiative heating at fixed boundary state

systematics.sensor_or_channel: cofabricated nanomechanical force calibrator and particle trap-frequency shift
systematics.calibration_method: 4-10 micrometre distance sweep in both boundary states
systematics.negative_control: non-tunable reference surface and far-distance baseline
systematics.acceptance_metric: relative force-model residual after electrostatic subtraction

systematics.sensor_or_channel: lateral phase map across the full superposition footprint
systematics.calibration_method: bidirectional lateral raster and branch-orientation reversal
systematics.negative_control: orthogonal branch orientation and translated surface sector
systematics.acceptance_metric: unmodeled phase standard deviation per shot

systematics.sensor_or_channel: blind-state classifier audit and time-indexed nuisance matrix
systematics.negative_control: random label permutation preserving block structure

commissioning.objective: Measure both boundary states, surface topography, patches, loss response, temperature dependence, and device geometry before force or coherence inference.
Establish a repeatable gate-dependent boundary-force contrast independently of the superposition sensor.
Commission stable particle operation from 10 to 4 micrometres and measure every switching-to-sensor transfer function.
Demonstrate transverse state preparation and quantify phase/decoherence repeatability before using boundary labels.
Run 400 paired windows to validate the blinded acquisition, covariance, exclusion, and nuisance-reentry pipeline.
Acquire at least 1600 paired windows under the frozen protocol and classify the result using the registered decision table.

model_lanes.claim_ceiling: Standard electromagnetic boundary response after measured material and geometry receipts.
Rate comparison only; not collapse identification.
No collapse identification until a source-backed non-collinear secondary signature is registered.
No manifold claim until stress/noise, causal metric response, gauge, and coherence dynamics are registered.

decision_table.condition: Any hash, calibration, clock, covariance, blinding, exclusion, or reproduction hard gate fails.
decision_table.permitted_statement: The campaign is invalid or incomplete and must be repeated after correction.
decision_table.forbidden_statement: Any physical null, residual, collapse, or manifold conclusion.

decision_table.condition: The boundary coefficient and all registered secondary residuals are statistically consistent with zero at the frozen sensitivity.
decision_table.permitted_statement: Upper bounds on boundary-conditioned coherence and phase residuals under the registered apparatus conditions.
decision_table.forbidden_statement: Objective collapse or manifold response is disproved universally.

decision_table.condition: A residual is reproduced by a registered thermal, electromagnetic, mechanical, optical, gas, surface, or readout transfer function.
decision_table.permitted_statement: A quantified ordinary coupling explains the observed boundary correlation.
decision_table.forbidden_statement: Evidence for objective collapse, quantum foam, or gravitational manifolds.

decision_table.condition: A repeatable residual survives registered nuisance models and negative controls but no source-backed candidate model uniquely predicts its joint signature.
decision_table.permitted_statement: An unexplained boundary-conditioned residual requiring independent replication and expanded systematics.
decision_table.forbidden_statement: Detection of DP collapse, Penrose reduction, quantum foam, or manifold manipulation.

decision_table.condition: A preregistered source-backed model predicts the joint primary and secondary signature, competing models fail, and independent replication succeeds.
decision_table.permitted_statement: Evidence favoring the named registered model within its tested parameter domain.
decision_table.forbidden_statement: Universal proof of objective collapse or controllable spacetime manipulation.

proposal_nonclaims: The proposal does not assume that Casimir force equals DP gravitational self-energy.
The proposal does not treat negative renormalized energy density as scalar negative curvature.
A software certificate does not validate an experimental mechanism.
A boundary-correlated coherence residual is not automatically objective collapse.
A null result constrains only the registered apparatus and parameter domain.
No manifold-response rate is computed without a registered causal dynamics model.
